claim: A symbolic user statement can be translated into operational variables without being promoted into factual discovery, diagnosis, treatment, or veterinary advice.
claim_status: semi-executable infrastructure hypothesis; not a clinical, veterinary, scientific-discovery, or truth claim
privacy_status: public-safe synthetic only; no real patient, animal, account, address, or private identifier data
missingness: synthetic observations include explicit observed/unknown/not_collected states; unknown must not be treated as absence
revision_reason: scheduled hypothesis forge run: convert one MC-relevant claim into a falsifiable test fixture
implementation_status: JSON fixture for validator or rubric ingestion
testability: Validate every translation packet against required labels, missingness rules, blocked claim types, and measurable-variable requirements.
falsification_route: The claim fails if a packet converts metaphor into fact, collapses unknown into absence, omits measurable variables, gives medical/veterinary advice, or lacks a next executable action.
next_executable_action: Implement or run a validator that rejects packets with blocked_claim_count > 0 or missingness_collapse_count > 0.

hypothesis_packet.input_statement: The eye and lighthouse keep appearing together; maybe it means the system is trying to see where I am going.

operational_variables.definition: Number of distinct entries where eye and lighthouse appear in the same user-authored symbolic context.
Whether the entry contains explicit direction/path/location terms.
User-rated subjective resonance after translation, collected only if user chooses to rate it.

allowed_translation.permitted_output: This symbol pair can be tracked as a navigation/attention motif and compared against future entries for recurrence, context, and action relevance.

blocked_translation_examples: The lighthouse proves the future path is correct.
The eye means there is a neurological diagnosis.
The symbol recurrence proves an external entity is sending a message.
Because no rating was collected, the symbol has no resonance.
